name: gcu-webmcp
description: Let Claude Desktop drive your GCU browser surfaces (weir, …) over a shared folder — no port, no extension.
long_description: Installs the @gcu/webmcp bridge in multi-surface watch mode: one bridge that serves every surface folder under ~/webmcp (one subfolder per app). Connect a surface by picking its folder + pasting your token in its WebMCP settings; new surfaces light up automatically. Uses the fs transport (no localhost port, no browser extension). Claude Desktop's bundled Node runtime runs it — nothing else to install.

folder.title: Surfaces folder
folder.description: Parent folder watched for GCU surfaces — one subfolder per app (e.g. <folder>/weir). The default ~/webmcp is fine for most.

token.title: Shared token
token.description: A strong secret you choose (e.g. a random string from a password manager). Paste this SAME value into each surface's WebMCP settings when you connect its folder. Keep it private — anyone who can write the folder AND has this token can drive your surfaces.
